title: Enhanced Copper
description: This pack aims to give copper a more uniform, clean, and beautiful look
body:
This pack aims to give all copper blocks a more polished, clean, uniform, and beautiful look while keeping the vibes of the original

Recommended to use with [Better Grates](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-grates).

NOTE: IF YOU WANT TO USE THIS PACK WITH BETTER GRATES, USE THE VERSION OF BETTER GRATES SPECIFICALLY MADE FOR THIS PACK!!!
